## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `cd app && npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `cd app && npm test`
- [ ] `cd app && npm run build`
- [ ] Desktop path checked when the change touches Tauri or native file behavior.
- [ ] Browser/UI smoke test checked with local Playwright when the change touches rendered UI.

## Release and Community Checks

- [ ] User-facing release/update docs are synced across all READMEs when applicable.
- [ ] No private reading notes, copyrighted story text, or unmarked spoilers are included.
- [ ] Issue, discussion, or rationale is linked below.

## Notes for Reviewers
